chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1583 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 08.12.2022 Mr. NizamuddinVeeghio advocate for petitioner along with petitioner. Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajpar, Assistant A.G. Sindh along with Mr. Qurban Ali Rahu, District Education Officer (Secondary) Shaheed Benazirabad. ----- Mr. Qurban Ali Rahu, District Education Officer (Secondary) Shaheed Benazirabadis present and submits that seniority list was prepared in haste and since the petitioner was not in contact with his office, his name got missed therein by mistake. He undertakes to rectify the mistake and prepare the correct seniority list putting name of the petitioner at right place of his seniority and forward the same for promotion to the next grade to relevant quarters before meeting of Departmental Promotion Committee (DPC) within a period of one week. Petitioner is satisfied and petition is accordingly disposed of in the terms as stated above along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
